meaning: n.穗,长钉,钉鞋,女高跟鞋,道钉v.用大钉钉,用长而尖之物刺,阻止,穿刺
examples: Even with some smoothing, there would still be a slight spike.
I share the house with Jim, Ian and Sam, not forgetting Spike, the dog.
Her first major role was in Martin Scorsese's "Goodfellas" and she followed this with a part in Spike Lee's "Jungle Fever."
Equally appropriately, considering the rivalry between Microsoft and Sony, Spike also airs Impact Wrestling.
This scenario has it that the dollar plummets, interest rates spike, stocks fall, recession follows.
